_meta.purpose: Phase D V1 latent interruption enabler registry. Each entry describes a card that, while present in a specific zone, can trigger an Extra Deck Summon during the opponent's turn — converting an on-summon-trigger tag on the target into a realized interruption.
_meta.scope: V1 only — Masquerena (Link-2 path) + Super Polymerization (Fusion path). Phase E (dedicated combo-enabler work) will extend with Ultra Polymerization, Predaplant Verte Anaconda (Super Poly tutor), Formula Synchron (Accel Synchro), Rank-Up-Magic spells, and archetype-locked enablers (Branded Fusion at quick-play timing, etc.).

65741786.notes: Quick Effect on opp turn: Link Summon a Link-2 using 2 materials Masquerena controls (including herself). Masquerena is consumed as material → her zone frees up for the Link-2 to land in. Slot-check must therefore treat Masquerena-in-EMZ as a free slot for Phase D target summon.

48130397.notes: Quick-Play Spell: discard 1 card, Fusion Summon using monsters from either field as materials. The Fusion Summoned monster needs a free EMZ (or Link-arrow-pointed MZONE). Fusion materials from opp's field are consumed, which may free up space on opp's side but does not directly help PLAYER's EMZ slot. For V1, slot-check requires PLAYER's EMZ to be free independently of Super Poly's material sourcing.
